meaning: adj.有脊椎骨的,有脊椎的,有骨气的
examples: Prof Priede said: "These worms are members of a little-known group of animals close to the missing link in evolution between backboned and invertebrate animals."
The holders, who had seven members on Armagh's All-Ireland panel, will go in as strong favourites against a Dromintee line-up backboned by the four O'Rourke brothers.
